title: GitHub Integration Hardening — Fix 7 Outstanding Issues
boundary: GitHub Integration Hardening — wire GitHubService, add error UI, token cleanup, auth guard, safe error handling, cache TTL, and layer tests
consumer_purpose: Harden the existing GitHub integration code by closing 7 safety/reliability gaps
claim_atoms: GitHubService defaultLayer is wired into AppLayer and composes correctly
review-tab shows github.noAuth message when GitHub token is missing
github-clear-token IPC handler and preload bridge exist for future account delete UI to call
github-set-token IPC handler validates sender origin before setting token
All catch handlers in github/service.ts properly wrap errors in GitHubApiError
refreshTokenCache in account.ts uses Duration.hours(1) TTL instead of Duration.zero (fixes cache being a no-op)
Smoke test verifies GitHubService layer composes without runtime errors
content:
{
  "plan": {
    "plan_id": "github-integration-hardening-v1",
    "title": "GitHub Integration Hardening — Fix 7 Outstanding Issues",
    "boundary": "GitHub Integration Hardening — wire GitHubService, add error UI, token cleanup, auth guard, safe error handling, cache TTL, and layer tests",
    "consumer_purpose": "Harden existing GitHub integration by closing safety/reliability gaps identified in cartographer findings GH-001 through GH-009",
    "revision": 3,
    "generated_at": "2026-05-29T14:00:00Z",
    "revision_notes": "Revision 3: Updated root cause for fix-E (Duration.zero means evict immediately — cache is currently a no-op, not just unbounded). Updated fix count to 4 locations not 3. Added executor notes from impact assessor findings.",
    "root_causes": {
      "rc-wire": {
        "hypothesis": "GitHubService.layer(token) is a factory requiring runtime token — no Config-backed defaultLayer was ever implemented",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": ["service.ts exports layer(token: string) factory — not a defaultLayer", "app-runtime.ts merges ~50 services but never imports GitHubService", "Zero imports of GitHubService outside its own file", "IPC proxy pattern handles desktop API calls — GitHubService is for CLI use"]},
      "rc-ui": {
        "hypothesis": "github.noAuth i18n key was defined preemptively in en.ts but never wired into the review-tab JSX",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": ["en.ts:593 defines github.noAuth", "review-tab.tsx uses github.branchName, github.commitMessage, github.createPullRequest but NOT github.noAuth", "Button is disabled silently with no feedback"]},
      "rc-cache-ttl": {
        "hypothesis": "Duration.zero in Effect Cache means 'evict immediately after insertion' — the cache is a complete no-op, not an unbounded cache",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": ["account.ts:246: timeToLive: Duration.zero", "Effect Cache source: Duration.isZero(ttl) removes entries from map immediately", "Every Cache.get() triggers full lookup — defeats caching entirely", "capacity=POSITIVE_INFINITY confirms author intended unbounded cache, not no-op"]},
      "rc-error-casts": {
        "hypothesis": "The local Error type alias shadows global Error — `error as Error` is a type-level bypass that passes raw untagged errors through at runtime",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": ["4 locations at lines 86, 117, 143, 174 all use `error as Error`", "service.ts:13: type Error = GitHubApiError | GitHubAuthError shadows global Error class", "First tryPromise in each method correctly wraps in new GitHubApiError(...)", "handleResponse can throw SyntaxError on JSON parse failure — unwrapped"]},
      "rc-no-auth-guard": {
        "hypothesis": "The `_event` parameter is named with underscore convention indicating intentional non-use — no origin validation was implemented",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": ["github-set-token at ipc.ts:455 uses `_event` — unused", "No other github IPC handler validates origin either", "Any renderer frame can inject arbitrary token via preload bridge"]},
      "rc-token-cleanup": {
        "hypothesis": "No desktop account delete UI exists to hook into — github-clear-token handler+bridge exist but are unreachable from account delete flow",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": ["github-clear-token at ipc.ts:456 EXISTS", "githubClearToken at preload/index.ts:94 EXISTS", "Account.remove only deletes from AccountTable in DB", "No desktop settings/account management page exists"]}
    },
    "fixes": [
      {"id": "fix-D", "description": "Replace 4 unsafe error casts with proper GitHubApiError wrapping in service.ts", "files": ["packages/opencode/src/github/service.ts"],
        "before": "4 catch handlers use `(error) => error as Error` — this is a type-level bypass. The local `Error = GitHubApiError | GitHubAuthError` union doesn't include native Error. These return the raw rejection value (e.g., SyntaxError from JSON.parse) as-if it were a tagged error.",
        "after": "Replace all 4 locations with `(error) => new GitHubApiError({ message: String(error), status: 0 })` — consistent with the first tryPromise in each method.",
        "impact": {"affected_files": ["packages/opencode/src/github/service.ts"], "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck packages/opencode"]},
        "risks": ["GitHubApiError extends Schema.TaggedErrorClass which extends Error — satisfies Effect.tryPromise catch type constraint", "No behavioral change for success cases — only error path type safety improves"]},
      {"id": "fix-E", "description": "Fix refreshTokenCache — Duration.zero makes cache a no-op. Change to Duration.hours(1).", "files": ["packages/opencode/src/account/account.ts"],
        "before": "timeToLive: Duration.zero — Effect Cache evicts entries immediately after insertion. The cache is a complete no-op. Every token access triggers a fresh network request.",
        "after": "timeToLive: Duration.hours(1) — entries live for up to 1 hour before re-fetch. Combined with isTokenFresh guard (5 min eager threshold), this provides proper caching.",
        "impact": {"affected_files": ["packages/opencode/src/account/account.ts"], "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck packages/opencode", "bun test --filter 'account' in packages/opencode"]},
        "risks": ["Duration.hours(1) makes the cache actually work — potential for 1-hour stale tokens if server-side revocation happens. Acceptable for refresh_token flow."]},
      {"id": "fix-A", "description": "Wire GitHubService into AppLayer — extract makeService, add Config-backed defaultLayer", "files": ["packages/opencode/src/github/service.ts", "packages/opencode/src/effect/app-runtime.ts"],
        "before": "GitHubService.layer(token) is a factory — no defaultLayer. AppRuntime has ~50 merged layers but not GitHubService.",
        "after": "Extract Service.of(...) into makeService(token) helper. Add defaultLayer reading GITHUB_TOKEN from Config (optional — falls back to empty string). Wire into AppLayer via Layer.provideMerge(GitHubService.defaultLayer).",
        "impact": {"affected_files": ["packages/opencode/src/github/service.ts", "packages/opencode/src/effect/app-runtime.ts"], "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck packages/opencode"]},
        "risks": ["MUST use Config.option — Config.string strict would make every AppRuntime call fail without GITHUB_TOKEN set", "app-runtime.ts has unstaged changes from concurrent lane — additive only"]},
      {"id": "fix-B", "description": "Show github.noAuth error message when GitHub token is missing in review-tab", "files": ["packages/app/src/pages/session/review-tab.tsx"],
        "before": "Button is disabled silently when no token — no user feedback. github.noAuth i18n key exists but is never rendered.",
        "after": "Add `<Show when={!hasToken()}>` block showing `language.t('github.noAuth')` with muted styling. IMPORTANT: `Show` must be added to the solid-js import.",
        "impact": {"affected_files": ["packages/app/src/pages/session/review-tab.tsx"], "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck packages/app"]},
        "risks": ["Must add `Show` to `import { ..., Show } from \"solid-js\"` — currently only has createEffect, createResource, createSignal, onCleanup, type JSX"]},
      {"id": "fix-C", "description": "Add origin validation to github-set-token IPC handler", "files": ["packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts"],
        "before": "github-set-token at ipc.ts:450 uses `_event` unconvention — any renderer frame can set arbitrary GitHub token via preload bridge.",
        "after": "Check `event.sender.getURL()` against expected origins. Allow file:// (dev mode) and http://localhost:* (dev server). Reject unknown origins.",
        "impact": {"affected_files": ["packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts"], "tests_to_run": ["bun typecheck packages/desktop"]},
        "risks": ["file:// origins must be allowed in dev mode", "Electron's event.senderFrame may be null — use event.sender.getURL() instead", "Origin check breaks if renderer loads from unexpected URL"]},
      {"id": "fix-F", "description": "Add smoke test for GitHubService layer composition", "files": ["packages/opencode/test/github/service.test.ts"],
        "before": "No tests exist for packages/opencode/src/github/ section.",
        "after": "Smoke test: (1) Layer.build(GitHubService.defaultLayer) succeeds without env var, (2) Error types constructable, (3) layer factory produces Layer<Service>",
        "impact": {"affected_files": ["packages/opencode/test/github/service.test.ts"], "tests_to_run": ["bun test --filter 'github' in packages/opencode"]},
        "risks": ["Service uses native fetch() inside Effect.tryPromise — tests that call methods need global fetch mocking. Smoke test avoids method calls."]},
      {"id": "fix-G", "description": "Deferred: GitHub token cleanup on account delete", "files": [],
        "before": "github-clear-token handler (ipc.ts:456) + preload bridge (preload/index.ts:94) exist. No desktop account delete UI calls them.",
        "after": "No code change. Handler+bridge exist. When desktop account settings page is built, it should call githubClearToken() alongside Account.remove() in core.",
        "impact": {"affected_files": [], "tests_to_run": []},
        "risks": ["Account.remove runs in @opencode-ai/core, not Electron renderer — coupling must be in desktop layer", "No desktop account delete UI exists"]}
    ],
    "apply_order": ["fix-D", "fix-E", "fix-A", "fix-B", "fix-C", "fix-F"],
    "dependencies": {"fix-D": [], "fix-E": [], "fix-A": ["fix-D"], "fix-B": [], "fix-C": [], "fix-F": ["fix-A"], "fix-G": []},
    "risks": [
      "app-runtime.ts has unstaged changes from concurrent lane — additive Layer.provideMerge only, preserve existing",
      "account.sql.ts is marked DO NOT TOUCH — fix-E changes only account.ts",
      "GitHubService.defaultLayer MUST use Config.option — Config.string without option makes all AppRuntime calls fail",
      "fix-B: Must add `Show` to solid-js import in review-tab.tsx (not currently imported)",
      "bun typecheck for service.ts should pass — `error as Error` → `new GitHubApiError({...})` is the same type shape"
    ],
    "rollback_plan": "Revert reverse: fix-F (delete), fix-C (revert origin check), fix-B (revert JSX), fix-A (revert Layer.provideMerge + service changes, keep fix-D error wraps), fix-E (revert account.ts Duration), fix-D (revert error casts)",
    "validation_strategy": {
      "step_1": "bun typecheck packages/opencode (fix-D, fix-E, fix-A, fix-F)",
      "step_2": "bun typecheck packages/desktop (fix-C)",
      "step_3": "bun typecheck packages/app (fix-B)",
      "step_4": "bun test --filter 'github' in packages/opencode (fix-F)",
      "step_5": "bun test --filter 'account' in packages/opencode (fix-E)"
    },
    "shared_file_coordination": {
      "packages/opencode/src/effect/app-runtime.ts": "Dirty file — additive Layer.provideMerge only",
      "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts": "Additive origin guard — no reformatting",
      "packages/opencode/src/account/account.ts": "One-line Duration change — minimal diff"
    },
    "new_files": ["packages/opencode/test/github/service.test.ts"],
    "modified_files": ["packages/opencode/src/github/service.ts", "packages/opencode/src/effect/app-runtime.ts", "packages/app/src/pages/session/review-tab.tsx", "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts", "packages/opencode/src/account/account.ts"],
    "executor_notes": [
      "fix-D: 4 locations, not 3. Lines 86, 117, 143, 174 in service.ts. The first tryPromise in each method already wraps correctly — only the nested handleResponse catches are broken.",
      "fix-E: Duration.zero means cache evicts immediately — this is NOT an unbounded cache, it's a non-functional cache. Changing to Duration.hours(1) FIXES the cache entirely.",
      "fix-A: import path is `@/github/service` using the `@/` prefix. The import should be `import { Service as GitHubService } from \"@/github/service\"`",
      "fix-B: Add `Show` to the solid-js import line. Current: `import { createEffect, createResource, createSignal, onCleanup, type JSX } from \"solid-js\"` → `import { Show, createEffect, createResource, createSignal, onCleanup, type JSX } from \"solid-js\"`",
      "fix-C: Use `event.sender.getURL()` not `event.senderFrame` (may be null in some Electron contexts). `_event` → `event` rename needed.",
      "fix-F: Follow test pattern from packages/opencode/test/account/service.test.ts. Use `describe`, `it`, `expect` from bun:test."
    ],
    "scope_gaps": [
      "GH-006 (token cleanup): Infrastructure exists but no desktop account delete UI to hook into. Deferred.",
      "GH-008 (PR stub): console.log remains — hardening scope only.",
      "GH-009 (raw fetch vs Octokit): Not addressed. fetch() works for IPC proxy pattern."
    ]
  }
}
revision_notes: Revision 3: Incorporated root cause analysis findings — fix-E Duration.zero means evict immediately (cache is no-op, not unbounded). Added executor_notes with detailed guidance for each fix. Updated fix-D count to 4 locations. Added import guidance for fix-B (Show import) and fix-A (import path).
